hero.name: Starters
hero.tagline: A registry of production-grade code starters
hero.description: Hand-reviewed Next.js, Electron, and React Native templates. All MIT. All clone-in-twelve-seconds with 1devtool create.

items.name: landing-saas-analytics
items.description: Dark dashboard hero, metric breakdown, integrations strip, pricing, and FAQ. Paired with ServerCompass copy as a demo.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: saas-control-plane
items.description: Auth, billing seams, custom-domain onboarding, and a Cloudflare DNS setup guide baked in. The starter behind ServerCompass.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: blog-magazine
items.description: Masthead, cover story, columns, and archive — all loaded from markdown. Fraunces + Inter on cream paper.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: blog-dev
items.description: Terminal chrome, tag sidebar, series index, syntax-highlighted code blocks. Used by log.stoicsoft.com.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: document-product-docs
items.description: GitBook-style documentation shell with generated sidebars, page outlines, code blocks, and original 1DevTool copy.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: document-api-reference
items.description: Endpoint-first docs template with authentication, webhooks, rate limits, and custom-domain examples in markdown.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: document-runbook
items.description: Incident response docs for alerts, status updates, postmortems, and escalation policies. Built for ServerCompass teams.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: landing-ai-saas
items.description: Chat-demo dashboard, gradient glow hero, multi-section flow, pricing. Built on the Aether product template.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: landing-server-monitoring
items.description: Live status dashboard, world map, sparkline probes, alerts drawer. The exact structure of servercompass.app.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: directory-saas-tools
items.tagline: SaaS tool directory with JSON data
items.description: A curated-tools directory pattern loaded from a single JSON file. Home grid, detail pages, submission form.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: desktop-app
items.description: File-based routing, auto-updater, macOS and Windows builds, signed-release script. Powers the 1DevTool desktop app.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: landing-fintech-app
items.description: Navy palette with dashboard mockup, live ticker, security grid, pricing. Paired with fictional brand Vaulta.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: landing-creative-agency
items.description: Oversized display serif, asymmetric bento work grid, warm cream palette, numbered services.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: landing-podcast
items.description: Player card with waveform, episode list, host bios, subscribe platforms. Inspired by Signal FM.
items.author: StoicSoft

items.name: landing-conference
items.description: Big display type, speakers grid, two-day schedule, tiered tickets. Modelled on the Shipped conference.
items.author: StoicSoft
